nasb.text: David said to Ahimelech, “Now is there not a spear or a sword on hand? For I brought neither my sword nor my weapons with me, because the king’s matter was urgent.”

esv.text: Then David said to Ahimelech, “Then have you not here a spear or a sword at hand? For I have brought neither my sword nor my weapons with me, because the king’s business required haste.”

cnv.text: 大衛問亞希米勒：“你手下有槍有刀沒有？因為王的事很急迫，所以我手裡連刀劍或其他武器都沒有帶來。”

ccb.text: 大卫问亚希米勒：“你这里有没有刀枪？因为王的事紧急，仓促间我连兵器也没有带。”
